title.rendered: Blind common anabolic steroid screening – oils

content.rendered:
Our flagship test of common anabolic steroids. This analysis screens your oil sample for presence and amount of all anabolic steroids listed in PARAMETERS section below.

With blind testing, you do not need to tell us which of the steroids you suspect in your sample. All on the list will get detected and their amount measured, even in mixtures.
